name: Sales Order Items
abapLogic:
SELECT vbap~vbeln, vbap~posnr, vbap~matnr, vbap~kwmeng, vbap~netwr, vbap~waerk, vbak~vkorg, vbak~erdat
  FROM vbap INNER JOIN vbak ON vbak~vbeln = vbap~vbeln
  WHERE vbap~mandt = sy-mandt
    AND vbak~erdat BETWEEN p_datum1 AND p_datum2
    AND vbap~abgru = space.

aiInsights.text: Field mapping: 8/9 fields auto-mapped. ZFLD_LEGACY has no S/4 equivalent — manual mapping required.
Delta handling: Use CDSView @Analytics.dataCategory with delta key on ERDAT+AEDAT.
